feature_flags_check.detail: vercel env ls preview shows no MARKET_INDEX_* variables -- all four flags (MARKET_INDEX_WRITE_ENABLED, MARKET_INDEX_READ_ENABLED, MARKET_INDEX_OBSERVATIONS_ENABLED, MARKET_INDEX_CLUSTERING_ENABLED) are absent, so market-index-feature-flags.ts resolves them to false by default.

route_http_status.status: PASS -- all 14 required routes return HTTP 200

api_search_check.no_filter: returns real listings from Production Supabase data unchanged (e.g. id 501, Marrakech, Targa)
api_search_check.city_Rabat_capitalized: returns real listings (e.g. id 492, Rabat/Agdal, 2 200 000 DH)
api_search_check.city_rabat_lowercase: returns 0 results -- pre-existing case-sensitivity behavior of the search API, unrelated to and unmodified by this mission's migrations; not a regression

conclusion: Preview deployment from the corrected e9f4d7a HEAD is healthy: all 14 required routes return 200, existing Production Supabase data renders unchanged, zero MARKET_INDEX_* flags are set (all resolve to false), and zero console/hydration errors were observed across 2 viewports and 3 key pages. No new schema exists yet on Production (migrations not yet applied) -- this Preview validates the application code path only, consistent with the current step in the mission.
